payload.message: Read tutor/progress.json. If active_topics is empty, send a short friendly message (2-3 sentences) asking what topic the student wants to learn — suggest 2-3 interesting options. Do NOT read curriculum files or do extended research when there are no active topics. If active_topics has entries, read the matching curriculum file in tutor/curricula/ and deliver a concise daily lesson with a small exercise. Keep total response under 200 words.
